title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Added docs/product-status.md as the audited product status source of truth and updated README/implementation-plan to point at it. Corrected stale roadmap accounting: Layer 1 is mostly complete with title-quality/repair-policy remaining, Layer 3 engine/planner side is mostly complete with host adapters remaining, Layer 4 provider boundary is substantially implemented, Layers 5-8 remain future product expansion. Verification: uv run pytest => 133 passed; git diff --check passed.
next_actions: Next slice: begin Layer 2 by finalizing summary/verbatim artifact contracts and repair/regenerate UX before implementation.
